title: Odra
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Odra-Cel.png]] |name=Odra |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Frost Sprite]]{{Ewoks|The Season Scepter}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Yellow]] |skin=Teal |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Anything for you, Odra, my dear Duchess of Sleet.|The Snow King|audio=SnowKingOdra-Ewoks.flac|}} '''Odra''', colloquially known as '''the Duchess of Sleet''', was a nefarious [[Frost Sprite]] who lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. She became [[Gender/Legends|mistress]] to the [[Snow King]], and she [[Temperature/Legends|froze]] his [[Heart/Legends|heart]], making him selfish and mean. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], she convinced the Snow King to [[Thief/Legends|steal]] the [[season scepter]], a [[Magic/Legends|magical]] [[Staff/Legends|staff]] that controlled the weather. The Snow King used the [[Scepter/Legends|scepter]] to [[Odra crisis|freeze]] the [[Moon/Legends|moon]], and with its power, Odra plotted to take the [[Sunstar/Legends|Sunstar]] from the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]]. The Snow King's [[Icehead]]s captured the Ewok [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]] and took her to the [[Snow Palace]]. Odra planned to trade Kintaka in exchange for the Sunstar, but Kintaka's friends came to [[Skirmish at the Snow Palace|rescue]] her. The Ewoks took back the season scepter and warmed the Snow King's frozen heart, melting Odra in the process. Defeated, Odra ran off in anger, and the Snow King restored Endor to its [[Summer/Legends|summer]] season. ==Biography== ===Frozen heart=== {{Quote|We've done it. We've frozen Endor. So brilliant. Stealing the Season Scepter, my dear Snow King.''"
"''Perhaps… Perhaps it was a mistake.''"
"''You're not getting warm-hearted on me, are you? We can't have that if you're to freeze the Ewoks and take their Sunstar.|Odra and the Snow King|audio=OdraDearSnowKing-Ewoks.flac|}} Odra, the [[Duchess/Legends|Duchess]] of [[Water/Legends|Sleet]], was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Frost Sprite]] who lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. She became romantically involved with the [[Snow King]]—one of four entities who controlled Endor's seasons—and lived with him in the [[Snow Palace]]. [[File:ColdCouple-TSS.png|thumb|left|275px|Odra and the Snow King celebrate their success.]] In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],{{EwoksDate|the appearance of Odra|The Season Scepter}} during Endor's [[Summer/Legends|summer]] season, Odra [[Temperature/Legends|froze]] the Snow King's [[Heart/Legends|heart]], making him selfish and mean. Under Odra's influence, the [[King/Legends|king]] sent [[Icehead]]s to [[Thief/Legends|steal]] the season scepter from his brother, the [[Sun King]]. Odra and the Snow King used the [[Magic/Legends|magical]] [[Scepter/Legends|staff]] to [[Odra crisis|freeze]] the [[Moon/Legends|moon]], sending a blanket of snow across its surface, and she cackled with delight. Odra complimented the Snow King on freezing Endor, but he began to reconsider their actions. Odra froze his heart again and instructed him to freeze the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] and take their powerful [[Sunstar/Legends|Sunstar]]. The [[Leaf Queen]], one of the Snow King's sisters, warned the Ewoks and told them to meet her at the [[Sun King's palace]]. As four Ewoks—[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], [[Latara/Legends|Latara]], [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]], and [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]]—traveled to the palace, Odra and the Snow King watched them through an oculus. Believing that the four Ewoks carried the Sunstar with them, Odra plotted to intercept the group before they could reach the Sun King. The Snow King ordered the Iceheads to capture the Ewoks and bring them to the Snow Palace. ===An icy blast=== {{Quote|No! No! I am the Duchess of Sleet. This can't be happening to me! I'll get you. I'll be back. I'll get you. I'll get you. I'll get you, I'll get you. You can't get rid of me!''"
"''What a drip.|Odra and Latara|audio=OdraDefeated-Ewoks.flac|}} The Iceheads took Kintaka [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] but failed to capture the rest. The Snow King froze Kintaka in a block of ice, and Odra praised the king's cleverness, stating that they could trade the Ewok princess for the Sunstar. Odra imagined the possible achievements she could do with the Sunstar's power, contemplating making a [[Necklace/Legends|necklace]] or destroying a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Her reverie was interrupted by the other three Ewoks, who had come to the Snow Palace to rescue Kintaka. The Ewoks had disguised themselves as "[[ice-on-a-stick]] [[Merchant/Legends|peddlers]]," and Odra vaguely recognized them. However, the Snow King noticed no deception, and he dropped the season scepter to eat one of the [[Foodstuff/Legends|treats]]. The Ewok Teebo tried to grab the season scepter but picked up an [[Icehead club]] instead. With the Ewoks' identities revealed, Odra laughed, and the Snow King picked up the [[Staff/Legends|scepter]]. [[File:OdraDefeated-TSS.png|thumb|right|275px|Odra is defeated by the Ewoks.]] Odra [[Skirmish at the Snow Palace|commanded]] the Snow King to freeze the Ewoks, and they scattered as he fired icy energy from the scepter. The Iceheads pursued Teebo and Warrick, and Odra began to chase Latara. One of the Iceheads collided into Odra, and both fell to the floor. Soon after, Teebo took the scepter from the Snow King and wildly fired its seasonal energy. One blast struck Odra and melted her membranous [[Crown/Legends|headdress]], revealing her bald head. Odra and the Snow King demanded that Teebo return the scepter, but Warrick ran to Teebo's aid. Warrick grabbed the scepter and fired it at the Snow King, warming the king's icy heart and melting Odra. The Frost Sprite yelled in defeat and shrank to a tiny proportion of her original size. Once her transformation was complete, she screamed defiantly and scuttled out of the Snow Palace, claiming that she would return. With Odra gone, the Snow King restored Endor to its summer season and returned the scepter to the Sun King. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|You see, our brother, the Snow King, has fallen in love with an evil Frost Sprite, Odra, the Duchess of Sleet.''"
"''A real cold chick, indeed.|The Leaf Queen and the Sun King|audio=LeafQueenandSunKing-Ewoks.flac|}} Odra was a Frost Sprite with [[Color/Legends|teal]] skin and yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. Enthralling and nefarious,{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}} Odra froze the heart of the Snow King and manipulated him to steal the season scepter. During Odra's reign with the Snow King, she stated that she loved the Iceheads' manner of locomotion. When Odra was struck by the season scepter's power, she melted, shrank to a diminutive scale, and yelled in defiance. According to the Sun King, Odra was a "real cold chick." She desired to possess the Sunstar and considered using it to make a necklace or destroy a planet. ==Equipment== {{Quote|What shall I do with the Sunstar? Make a necklace? Destroy a planet? ''[cackles]'' Ah, the possibilities.|Odra|audio=OdraSunstar-Ewoks.flac|}} In the Snow Palace, Odra and the Snow King used an oculus to spy on the Ewoks. Odra had a [[Throne/Legends|throne]] to the left of the Snow King's. Under her influence, the Snow King used the season scepter to freeze Endor. Odra wore a grey, full-length [[Clothing/Legends|gown]] with long sleeves and a black trim. She wore matching black shoes and [[Glove/Legends|gloves]]. Odra also wore a pointed black headdress that was melted away by the scepter. ==Behind the scenes== Odra first appeared in "[[The Season Scepter]]," the thirteenth episode in the [[Ewoks: Season Two|second season]] of the animated television series [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']], which premiered on [[November 1]], [[1986]]. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of Odra|imagecat=Images of Odra}} *{{Ewoks|The Season Scepter}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}} {{Imo}} *{{SW|url=news/from-wicket-to-the-duloks-revisiting-the-star-wars-ewoks-animated-series|text=From Wicket to the Duloks: Revisiting the ''Star Wars: Ewoks'' Animated Series|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Odra }} [[Category:Duchesses]] [[Category:Endorians]] [[Category:Frost Sprites]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]]
